dd1 <- nhanesSearch('breast') 
dd1 |> 
  filter(Begin.Year == 2017)
   Variable.Name

2          DRABF
3          DRABF
4          DRABF
5          DRABF

16        DBQ010
                                                                                                               Variable.Description
1                      Indicates whether the sample person was an infant who was breast-fed on either of the two recall days.  \r\n
2              Indicates whether the sample person was an infant who was breast-fed on either of the two recall \r\n\r\ndays.  \r\n
3              Indicates whether the sample person was an infant who was breast-fed on either of the two recall \r\n\r\ndays.  \r\n
4                      Indicates whether the sample person was an infant who was breast fed on either of the two recall days.  \r\n
5                      Indicates whether the sample person was an infant who was breast-fed on either of the two recall days.  \r\n
6              Indicates whether the sample person was an infant who was breast-fed on either of the two recall \r\n\r\ndays.  \r\n
7              Indicates whether the sample person was an infant who was breast-fed on either of the two recall \r\n\r\ndays.  \r\n
8                      Indicates whether the sample person was an infant who was breast fed on either of the two recall days.  \r\n
9                                                                                       {Are you/Is SP} now breast feeding a child?
10                                         How old was {SP} when {he/she} completely stopped breastfeeding or being fed breastmilk?
11 This next question is about the first thing that {SP} was given other than breast milk or formula.  Please include juice, cow's 
12          Now I'm going to ask you some general questions about {SP's} eating habits.  Was {SP} ever breastfed or fed breastmilk?
13                                                                                      {Are you/Is SP} now breast feeding a child?
14                                  How old was {SP} when {he/she} completely stopped breastfeeding or being fed breastmilk? (Days)
15 This next question is about the first thing that {SP} was given other than breast milk or formula.  Please include juice, cow's 
16          Now I'm going to ask you some general questions about {SP's} eating habits.  Was {SP} ever breastfed or fed breastmilk?
